AOSC200 & AOSC201

Weather and Climate and Weather and Climate Laboratory

Two additional 400-level AOSC courses

Total Credits

1 Or honors sequence: MATH340-MATH341.Completion of

MATH340 satisﬁes the requirement for MATH241; completion of MATH340-MATH341 satisﬁes the requirement for MATH240-MATH241-MATH246.
